data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Presenting users with a manageable number of options to reduce decision-making time.
data.technical_spec: Categorically features content to simplify menu navigation.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Easy-to-click buttons and interactive elements to improve usability.
data.technical_spec: Large call-to-action buttons and streamlined layouts for easy access.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: User interface design leverages chunking to improve user memory retention.
data.technical_spec: Content is presented in groups or categories to aid cognitive processing.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Aesthetic designs are perceived as more usable.
data.technical_spec: Visually appealing interfaces that align with corporate branding strategies.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: User expectations are aligned with common web experiences for consistency.
data.technical_spec: Design patterns that mirror popular streaming and social media platforms.
